_note: Pousser ce fichier déclenche .github/workflows/ld-logo-gen.yml (Replicate FLUX). Le PNG est commité automatiquement.
prompt: Premium realistic emblem badge logo for a clay-pigeon / ball-trap sport shooting club named 'LA DETENTE'. Centered composition: a realistic black AR-15 sporting rifle and a realistic over-and-under break-action clay-shooting shotgun crossed in a clean X. A glossy bright red 3D heart placed exactly over the crossing point in the dead center. An orange clay pigeon target shattering into a few fragments at the top. Below, the club name written large in a FUN bold playful slightly hand-drawn display lettering: LA DETENTE, in warm cream and gold with a dark outline, perfectly spelled. Dark charcoal background inside a subtle golden circular badge ring, centered, symmetrical, crisp clean edges, sport-club crest style, ready for t-shirt print and embroidery. Photorealistic brushed-metal and walnut-wood textures on the firearms, dramatic studio rim lighting, ultra detailed, professional vector-sharp logo, no watermark, no extra text besides LA DETENTE.
